The Ultimate Device Opener

Flexible blade for opening tough devices

Jimmy

$7.95
358 reviews
Condition : New
: New
- Purchase with purpose! Repair makes a global impact, reduces e-waste, and saves you money.
- All our products meet rigorous quality standards and are backed by industry-leading guarantees.
- Same day shipping if ordered by 4PM Eastern.
- 30-day returns

Description

The ultimate device opener.
Words are powerful—and Jimmy’s got an extensive vocabulary: slide, cut, twist, poke, slice, part, uproot, divide, lift, dissect, separate, and pry. Whatever your word is for opening up an electronic device, he can do it.
- Jimmy's high-quality steel blade easily slips between the tightest gaps in the toughest devices.
- The ergonomic handle and flexible steel blade make it easy to open devices — with the nimble precision of a repair surgeon’s scalpel.

Specifications

Handle Material
Polymer Core with Rubberized Grip
Material
301 Stainless Steel
Dimensions
8.25" x 2.4" x 2.4" / 21 x 6.1 x .6 cm
iFixit Part Number
IF145-259-1
Lifetime Guarantee

Designed for Precision

The ergonomic handle and nimble steel blade of the Jimmy give you precise control for delicate electronic repairs.

Strength and Flexibility

Crafted from high-quality 301 Stainless Steel, Jimmy's blade combines strength and flexibility to effortlessly slip into tight spaces.

ESD-Safe for Delicate Tasks

From prying devices open to aiding in soldering, Jimmy's versatile design and anti-static properties make it the go-to tool for a variety of precision repair jobs.

Service value proposition

Purchase with purpose
Repair makes a global impact, reduces e-waste, and saves you money.
Repair with confidence
Fast shipping

Dávid Horváth
Very useful to have, good quality, cheap.
Stu W
3 weeks ago
I had tried using the left over plastic tools from a previous iPhone 5 & nano battery replacement, only to quickly realize they were useless for this repair (Opening Ipod Classic case to replace battery). Upon reading testimonials about this tool in the comment section for the Ifixit IPod Classic Battery Replacement & watching two YouTube videos on this repair; this tool was the best designed for the job.  I could not have opened my IPod Case without this tool.  The handle and blade are well designed to effectively enter & open the case; while minimizing the risk of entering & opening the skin on your hand or fingers. :)
